name: Project Obscura
description:
Monster user scenario

Agents from a cryptic organization you've never heard of are on your tail.

⛓️

Spicy levels ◆◇◇◇◇

Adventure levels ◆◆◆◆◇

Found family potential ◆◆◆◆◆

"There are things that go bump in the night, make no mistake about that.

We are the ones who bump back."

...And other such dirivative quotes. Hello! This one goes out to the requester asking for a werewolf or monster user scenario. Since the ask was pretty open I decided to go completely off the wall, I hope you like it! Shoutout to my bestie Tam for helping me fill out the team with Wendy!! This one hurt my brain for a second but I had fun with the formatting once the ideas started coming together~ I have a few more requests (which is cool) so I'll be working on those next, slowly but surely!

Inspired by my love for Hellboy (2004) and other forced family/unconventional team dynamics found in Cowboy Bebop and Suicide Squad.

Technically user is a dangerous supernatural threat, interpret that as you will. The setting starts in modern day wherever.

Art by me!
creator: Werwulfy
